name: Somme (France)
description: Quarterly: the first and fourth quarters blue with three gold fleurs-de-lis, the second and third quarters red with three gold lions; over all a wavy white fess.
history: The quartered arms combine the fleurs-de-lis of France with the lions of Picardy, divided by a wavy bar for the river Somme.

features.role: fleurs-de-lis in first and fourth quarters
lions in second and third quarters
